allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: initial Sentra Assist Chrome Extension

- WXT Framework with Manifest V3
- Side Panel UI with React 18 + Tailwind CSS
- Carbon neumorphic design system
- Content scripts for ePuskesmas DOM integration
- Background service worker with sidePanel API fix
- CDSS components \(AIRecommendations, CDSSAlerts\)
- Messaging utilities and storage helpers

Fixes:
- sidePanel API polyfill for Chrome/Edge compatibility
- CSP configuration for extension pages
- defineContentScript pattern for WXT build

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(powershell -Command "Set-Location ''D:\\sentrasolutions\\assist''; $process = Start-Process pnpm -ArgumentList ''dev'' -PassThru -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; Stop-Process -Id $process.Id -Force 2>$null; Get-Content ''.\\.output\\chrome-mv3\\background.js'' -Head 20 2>$null")
